title: Farm trail run in aid of Usapho Indlu
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Usapho Indlu community...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Usapho Indlu community upliftment project is presenting a farm trail run/walk on Saturday 27 April at Redberry Farm.


> Entrants may choose between a 9km route that will start at 08:00, and a 5km route that will start at 08:10.


The entry fee is R30 for the 5km and R50 for the 9km run. Entries will take place from 07:30 on the day. Funds raised will go towards the purchase of a much-needed new bakkie.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
